hero.subtitle: Is chance an illusion? Dr. Adam Ben-Ari studies the patterns behind luck — until he discovers that luck itself is watching him.

about.description1: "The Luck Effect" is a psychological thriller set in contemporary Israel. When a former neuroscience researcher discovers unexplainable patterns in a sequence of 'random' events, he finds himself inside a web someone has carefully woven.
about.description2: The Collection — a secret archive from 1940 — may hold the key to all the secrets. But also the price.

character.description: Three years ago, Dr. Adam Ben-Ari was one of Israel's most promising researchers. After one catastrophe, he left everything — and opened a coffee shop. But the patterns keep haunting him.

chapters.part1_desc: Adam Ben-Ari meets a mysterious client at his coffee shop. She knows him too well.
chapters.part2_desc: A secret wartime archive. Old photographs. Names that should be dead.
chapters.part3_desc: When coincidence becomes a pattern, and a pattern becomes a threat, Adam realizes luck does not exist.

atmosphere.quote1: "He knew the coincidence wasn't random. It never was."
atmosphere.quote2: "Hidden within every sequence of events lies intent."
atmosphere.quote3: "Luck is the name we give to a pattern we haven't recognized yet."
atmosphere.quote4: "The Collection was not an archive. It was a mirror — and someone was looking back."

author.name: Vyacheslav Bard
author.bio1: Israeli author, immigrant from Russia, writing Hebrew as an art language. "The Luck Effect" is his debut novel.
author.bio2: The book was written over three years and combines psychological investigation with precise narrative architecture.

reviews.review1_text: "From the first page I knew this was a special book. The prose is clear, the plot tightens and doesn't let go."
reviews.review2_text: "A fascinating blend of thriller and philosophy. Bard built a world you want to stay in even when it frightens you."
reviews.review3_text: "The character of Adam Ben-Ari will haunt me for a long time. An extraordinary book."

newsletter.title: Get Updates Directly
newsletter.subtitle: Leave your email and be the first to know about publication, launch events, and exclusive chapters.
